RStudio addin: open path in file explorer

addin_open_in_explorer.Rd

Opens a location in the system file explorer. The target is resolved to a path in this order:

  • the selected text, if any;

  • otherwise the path-like token under the cursor (so you can just place the cursor on a path or an object holding one, no selection needed);

  • otherwise the current working directory (getwd()).

An existing literal path is used as-is; anything else is evaluated as R code (e.g. an object or call that returns a path). A resolved file is revealed inside its containing folder; a directory is opened directly.

Usage

addin_open_in_explorer()

Developed by Daniel Madsen.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
